name: Spiderling

attacks.name: Poisonous bite
attacks.tell: The little spider runs towards you and delivers a quick bite
attacks.howToAvoid: A single blow from the weapon usually kills it before it can bite; otherwise block or move away
attacks.notes: Can apply a very mild poison to the player; low individual damage, but spiders usually attack in groups

description: A tiny baby spider found near webs, egg sacs, and larger nests. Alone it is fragile, but in groups it can wear a careless player down quickly.
behavior: It stays within small areas, climbs already-spun webs, and alternates between patrolling and resting on them. When a web or sac is disturbed, several can rush the same location.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player and runs or jumps in to close distance. It can also spawn from bursting web sacs, making seemingly clear areas dangerous in an instant.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive toward other spiders and often rests on orb weaver webs. It remains neutral to most other creatures until attacked.
strategy: Almost any weapon kills them quickly, but do not fight near sacs or large webs without checking the area first. If there are several, clear them before a larger spider joins the fight.
respawnInfo: Default: 1 day. Caves: 2 days. Frisbee: 3 days.
specialTraits: With Mom Genes equipped, friendly spiderlings can periodically spawn for the player.
